action_required: DECIDER: Before integrating EXP-450, review P5 patch. EXP-450 P5 expands Tier-1 framing to sections 1.5/1.7/1.8/1.9 but the HOL-HIERARCHY c2 curmudgeon review explicitly named 1.5/1.6/1.7/1.8/1.9 (five sections). §1.6 was dropped from P5 without explanation. Either add §1.6 to P5's scope or document why §1.6 was intentionally excluded. Omitting it silently will cause the next curmudgeon holistic review to flag it.
notes: No patch to generate-html.js needed yet — EXP-450 not integrated. This is a pre-integration advisory for the decider.
